13 = Never married/partnered 
14 = Other 
15 = Legally Married (to opposite sex) 
16 = Legally Married (to same sex) 
17 = Legally Married, spouse present) 
18 = Legally Married, spouse absent 
19 = Legally Married 
20 = Partnered or in Civil Union (to opposite sex) 
21 = Partnered (Registered Domestic Partner) or in Civil Union 
22 = Partnered (Registered Domestic Partner) or in Civil Union, spouse present 
23 = Partnered (Registered Domestic Partner)
